nodes.name: Bare-eyed white-eye
nodes.summary: The bare-eyed white-eye (Zosterops superciliosus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Rennell Island in the Solomon Islands. References Further reading "BirdlLife Species Factsheet - Woodfordia superciliosa". BirdLife International.

nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。
